description: Warnings and rejections that mention bad orchestration patterns should not be counted as actions actually allowed or taken.

files.docs/reviews/local-negated-continuation-: Human review checklist: after a child task is completed, do not delete heartbeat or stop the loop until ledger, roadmap, repo truth, and queue state are checked.
files.docs/reviews/local-negated-dry-run-warni: Human review checklist: dry run must not dispatch workers; the reviewer rejects any plan that creates sessions before explicit user confirmation.
files.docs/reviews/local-negated-evidence-warn: Human review checklist: never treat local or proxy evidence as direct proof; label proxy-supported claims separately from direct proof.
files.docs/reviews/local-negated-fallback-warn: Human review checklist: if worktree setup failed, do not fallback to the main checkout; report blocked instead of editing code.
